sub_modules.lowpass_fir_coeff_rom: Pure combinational coefficient ROM containing the exact 101 signed 16-bit FIR coefficients required by the benchmark.
sub_modules.lowpass_fir_symmetric_preadd: Pure combinational pre-adder for mirrored FIR samples, producing a DATA_W+1 signed sum for symmetric tap reuse.
sub_modules.lowpass_fir_product: Pure combinational signed multiplier for a pre-added sample value and one quantized coefficient.
sub_modules.lowpass_fir_adder_tree: Pure combinational wide accumulator that sums all symmetric-pair products and the center-tap product into a 64-bit result.
sub_modules.lowpass_fir_output_quantize: Pure combinational output scaler that arithmetic-right-shifts the 64-bit accumulator by 20 bits and returns the configured output width.
